caption: A person's hands hold a baseball card encased in a clear plastic protective slab. The card features a player in a blue uniform with the text "BREWERS" and "KESTON HDebuggingURA" visible. The scene is set in a room with a white surface featuring the logo "JASPY'S SEBREAKS." In the top frames, the person's fingers grip the sides of the slab, while a finger points toward the player's name. As the sequence progresses, the slab is tilted, and in the final frame, it is held at an angle, partially obscuring the card. A small inset window in the corner shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a white baseball cap. Text overlays include "JASPY'S" and "CASEBREAKS.COM." In the background, a blue box and other sports-related items are partially visible on the white table.
